description_long: This bungalow features a single-story rectangular structure with a flat, overhanging roof that extends to form a covered carport or patio area on one side. The exterior walls are smooth and painted white, with large windows and glass doors providing ample natural light. The front entrance is marked by a wooden door and a small set of steps leading up from a wide, dark gray paved area. The rear of the bungalow includes additional glass doors opening onto a spacious deck, ideal for outdoor living. The roof is supported by slender columns and appears to be made of corrugated metal or similar material. The interior layout is visible, showing multiple rooms and modern furnishings, suggesting a contemporary and functional design.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat overhanging roof, large windows, and a covered carport or patio area. Features spacious decks and a clean, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden door, large windows, and the covered carport or patio area to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended roof over the carport or patio, with visible windows and the paved area wrapping around.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass doors opening onto a wide deck, with more windows and a clear view of the interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing grouped vertical windows and the continuation of the paved area, with less emphasis on entry points.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
